DP.094.0000:
Oak: Ah, it’s you! Good to see you!
How is your Pokédex coming along?\f
Capturing every kind of Pokémon is
no easy feat, I’ll grant you that.\f
But I’m sure you can accomplish it!\f
DP.094.0001:
Oak: Ah, yes!\f
An acquaintance from Kanto has sent
me something quite interesting.\f
I think you’d make better use of it
than I ever could.\f
DP.094.0002:
I understand there is a Pokémon that
evolves when it is traded while holding\r
that Up-Grade.
